name: ui-top-down-shooter-board
description: TopDownShooterBoard — sci-fi top-down shooter with MOVE/FIRE input wiring, wave/score/lives HUD, FIRE control button, and UI Pack - Sci-fi assets.

schema.name: ui-top-down-shooter-board
schema.description: TopDownShooterBoard — sci-fi top-down shooter with MOVE/FIRE input wiring, wave/score/lives HUD, FIRE control button, and UI Pack - Sci-fi assets.

emits.description: Emits UI:{tileClickEvent} with { x, y } on tile/arena click
Emits UI:{unitClickEvent} with { unitId } on unit click
Emits UI:{gameEndEvent} with {result} when the game reaches won or lost
Emits UI:{playAgainEvent} with {} on play again / reset

events.name: Unit Click
events.description: Emits UI:{unitClickEvent} with { unitId } on unit click

events.name: Tile Click
events.description: Emits UI:{tileClickEvent} with { x, y } on tile/arena click

events.name: Game End
events.description: Emits UI:{gameEndEvent} with {result} when the game reaches won or lost

events.name: Play Again
events.description: Emits UI:{playAgainEvent} with {} on play again / reset

lives.label: Starting Lives
lives.description: Lives the player starts with; reaching 0 = defeat

maxWaves.label: Max Waves
maxWaves.description: Number of waves to clear to win

scorePerKill.label: Score Per Kill
scorePerKill.description: Score awarded for each enemy destroyed

enemySpeed.label: Enemy Speed
enemySpeed.description: Pixels an enemy advances downward per tick

enemyHp.label: Enemy HP
enemyHp.description: Hit points each enemy starts with

moveStep.label: Move Step
moveStep.description: Pixels the player moves per key press

projectileSpeed.label: Projectile Speed
projectileSpeed.description: Pixels a projectile travels per tick

enemiesPerWave.label: Enemies Per Wave
enemiesPerWave.description: Enemies spawned at the top of each wave
